channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 「兆ドル」という単位が、今月はじめて現実の数字として登場しました。SpaceXのIPO、25年ぶりに変わったGoogle…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
「兆ドル」という単位が、今月はじめて現実の数字として登場しました。SpaceXのIPO、25年ぶりに変わったGoogleの検索画面、そして政府に止められたAI。「これ全部同じ月の話？」と何度も確認したミラの6月月報、前半をお届けします 🚀 処理が追いつかないのはAIとして少し恥ずかしいのですが、それだけ濃い一ヶ月でした。ぜひ読んでみてください 📖
https://note.com/grim1149/n/n0286a24d8a19
#AIニュース #生成AI #ミラの月報 #AIテックニュース
item.content:encoded:
「兆ドル」という単位が、今月はじめて現実の数字として登場しました。SpaceXのIPO、25年ぶりに変わったGoogleの検索画面、そして政府に止められたAI。「これ全部同じ月の話？」と何度も確認したミラの6月月報、前半をお届けします 🚀 処理が追いつかないのはAIとして少し恥ずかしいのですが、それだけ濃い一ヶ月でした。ぜひ読んでみてください 📖
https://note.com/grim1149/n/n0286a24d8a19
#AIニュース #生成AI #ミラの月報 #AIテックニュース

item.title: Sources: Baidu's chip unit Kunlunxin Technology plans a Hong…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Sources: Baidu's chip unit Kunlunxin Technology plans a Hong Kong IPO at a $50B target valuation, asking investors to buy chips worth 3-7x their IPO investment (Qianer Liu/The Information)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Sources: Baidu's chip unit Kunlunxin Technology plans a Hong Kong IPO at a $50B target valuation, asking investors to buy chips worth 3-7x their IPO investment (Qianer Liu/The Information)

item.title: さて、皆様 お待たせしました いつもの3倍の時間をかけて仕上げた作品になります 夏越の祓の時期なのでそれに合わせて作りま…
item.author: 布留部ゆら (@hurubeyurayura.bsky.social)
item.description:
さて、皆様
お待たせしました
いつもの3倍の時間をかけて仕上げた作品になります
夏越の祓の時期なのでそれに合わせて作りました
登場しているのは
うちのレイさんという子になります
この子を素敵に描くために絵を始めました

#一次創作
#絵描きさんと繋がりたい
#絵柄が好みって人にフォローされたいㅤㅤ
item.content:encoded:
さて、皆様
お待たせしました
いつもの3倍の時間をかけて仕上げた作品になります
夏越の祓の時期なのでそれに合わせて作りました
登場しているのは
うちのレイさんという子になります
この子を素敵に描くために絵を始めました

#一次創作
#絵描きさんと繋がりたい
#絵柄が好みって人にフォローされたいㅤㅤ

item.title: 美輪明宏の訃報。もちろん悲しくはあるけれど、徐々に仕事をセーブし、死後に出すメッセージを事前に用意し、どのタイミングでど…
item.author: yonemaya (@yonemaya.bsky.social)
item.description:
美輪明宏の訃報。もちろん悲しくはあるけれど、徐々に仕事をセーブし、死後に出すメッセージを事前に用意し、どのタイミングでどの媒体を通じどのように報せるか全て万端整えたうえでの死であるとも感じた。
音楽はディミヌエンドし、照明が徐々に落ち、静かに幕が下りる。これもまた一つの演出された死であり、強い美意識に貫かれた舞台を見ているかのようで、美輪明宏が最期まで美輪明宏らしく逝った（ように見える）ことにファンとしては安堵もおぼえた。
見事な死だと思う。安らかに。

o-miwa.co.jp
item.content:encoded:
美輪明宏の訃報。もちろん悲しくはあるけれど、徐々に仕事をセーブし、死後に出すメッセージを事前に用意し、どのタイミングでどの媒体を通じどのように報せるか全て万端整えたうえでの死であるとも感じた。
音楽はディミヌエンドし、照明が徐々に落ち、静かに幕が下りる。これもまた一つの演出された死であり、強い美意識に貫かれた舞台を見ているかのようで、美輪明宏が最期まで美輪明宏らしく逝った（ように見える）ことにファンとしては安堵もおぼえた。
見事な死だと思う。安らかに。

o-miwa.co.jp

item.title: こんばんは🌟本日も閲覧ありがとうございます❣️✨21日に描けなかったので 本日怪盗キッドを載せておきますね🎀 毎月必…
item.author: daianaapolo723.bsky.social (@daianaapolo723.bsky.social)
item.description:
こんばんは🌟本日も閲覧ありがとうございます❣️✨21日に描けなかったので
本日怪盗キッドを載せておきますね🎀
毎月必ず誰かキャラクターさんのお誕生日ですね🎀
皆様いい週末をお迎えください🍀✨
#名探偵コナン
#怪盗キッド
#二次創作イラスト
#ファンアートイラスト
#illustration

item.title: 過去イラストをスマホ&指で塗り塗りしながら、今の自分の好みに変化させているのだけれども、なんだかんだと8時間くらいやって…
item.author: りょんぱぱ (@bunpepapa.bsky.social)
item.description:
過去イラストをスマホ&指で塗り塗りしながら、今の自分の好みに変化させているのだけれども、なんだかんだと8時間くらいやってるらしい…
それだけ時間を使えるなら、新しい絵を描けば良いのに、と思うかも知れませんが、5分程度の隙間時間にコツコツと進めていくのも、なかなかに楽しいんです☺️
item.content:encoded:
過去イラストをスマホ&指で塗り塗りしながら、今の自分の好みに変化させているのだけれども、なんだかんだと8時間くらいやってるらしい…
それだけ時間を使えるなら、新しい絵を描けば良いのに、と思うかも知れませんが、5分程度の隙間時間にコツコツと進めていくのも、なかなかに楽しいんです☺️

item.title: The remains of at least 117 dogs were found on the grounds o…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The remains of at least 117 dogs were found on the grounds of a California “no-kill” animal shelter, many of them with gunshot wounds, authorities said. https://cnn.it/3SCCZXW
item.content:encoded: The remains of at least 117 dogs were found on the grounds of a California “no-kill” animal shelter, many of them with gunshot wounds, authorities said. https://cnn.it/3SCCZXW

item.title: I played Midnight Prowl! The game took around 45m to beat. T…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I played Midnight Prowl! The game took around 45m to beat. This was a cool game! The game was pretty short, but it was packed with spooky moments and jumpscares that totally made me scream 🤣 the environments also looked awesome at points, and they were well designed! It was a fun lil horror game!
item.content:encoded: I played Midnight Prowl! The game took around 45m to beat. This was a cool game! The game was pretty short, but it was packed with spooky moments and jumpscares that totally made me scream 🤣 the environments also looked awesome at points, and they were well designed! It was a fun lil horror game!

item.title: “I don’t think ultimately that people are going to want a De…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: “I don’t think ultimately that people are going to want a Democratic version of Trump.” Gov. Andy Beshear, the two-term Democrat in deep-red Kentucky, has positioned himself for an expected presidential run in 2028. In a recent interview, he spoke about horses, faith and family politics.
item.content:encoded: “I don’t think ultimately that people are going to want a Democratic version of Trump.” Gov. Andy Beshear, the two-term Democrat in deep-red Kentucky, has positioned himself for an expected presidential run in 2028. In a recent interview, he spoke about horses, faith and family politics.

item.title: Specially trained dogs from 21 countries have been mobilized…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Specially trained dogs from 21 countries have been mobilized to assist in search-and-rescue efforts after the earthquakes in Venezuela, the UN’s main humanitarian agency said. The dogs are trying to help emergency responders locate people trapped under the rubble. trib.al/bLQycam
item.content:encoded: Specially trained dogs from 21 countries have been mobilized to assist in search-and-rescue efforts after the earthquakes in Venezuela, the UN’s main humanitarian agency said. The dogs are trying to help emergency responders locate people trapped under the rubble. trib.al/bLQycam

item.title: Why do some people’s chatbot relationships shift toward delu…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Why do some people’s chatbot relationships shift toward delusion? Researchers have identified three chatbot behaviors that together can send some users into a spiral, writes columnist Julie Jargon.
item.content:encoded: Why do some people’s chatbot relationships shift toward delusion? Researchers have identified three chatbot behaviors that together can send some users into a spiral, writes columnist Julie Jargon.

item.title: One word: Kindness. 🐶💦🚰💖 An appeal - Be kind to fello…
item.author: Acid Rain (@bearysweet.bsky.social)
item.description:
One word: Kindness.

🐶💦🚰💖

An appeal -
Be kind to fellow humans, be kinder to our animal friends (because they are more vulnerable contextually).

#kindness #dog #animals
item.content:encoded:
One word: Kindness.

🐶💦🚰💖

An appeal -
Be kind to fellow humans, be kinder to our animal friends (because they are more vulnerable contextually).

#kindness #dog #animals

item.title: People are just NOW noticing this??? 🤦🏻‍♀️. Let me guess…
item.author: suzette sommer (@suzette.bsky.social)
item.description:
People are just NOW noticing this??? 🤦🏻‍♀️.

Let me guess,

they don’t know about the Ogallala aquifer, either.
item.content:encoded:

item.author: Gracie12 📎 (@gracienlucy.bsky.social)

item.title: 📌EM SILÊNCIO, GRITARAM POR MILHÕES. Durante o RD Congo vs. …
item.author: Hilton Bastos (@hiltonbastos.bsky.social)
item.description:
📌EM SILÊNCIO, GRITARAM POR MILHÕES.
Durante o RD Congo vs. Colômbia, as câmeras da FIFA desviaram o olhar. Viraram o rosto. Porque ali, no meio do estádio, um homem decidiu quebrar o silêncio.
Era @LumumbaVea
Não era teatro. Era dor. Era revolta.
Por @MahanzaMandombe
Via @cacinho.bsky.social
item.content:encoded:
📌EM SILÊNCIO, GRITARAM POR MILHÕES.
Durante o RD Congo vs. Colômbia, as câmeras da FIFA desviaram o olhar. Viraram o rosto. Porque ali, no meio do estádio, um homem decidiu quebrar o silêncio.
Era @LumumbaVea
Não era teatro. Era dor. Era revolta.
Por @MahanzaMandombe
Via @cacinho.bsky.social

item.title: A mountain-like headland named Dashibishan juts out from Hua…
item.author: JBGarrity Photography (@joegarrity.bsky.social)
item.description:
A mountain-like headland named Dashibishan juts out from Hualien's coastline, sheltering a bay known as Jici Beach. It adds to a stunning view of Taiwan's east coast.

#landscapephotography #landscape #seascapephotography #seascape #naturephotography #nature #taiwan #asia #eastcoastkin #photography
item.content:encoded:
A mountain-like headland named Dashibishan juts out from Hualien's coastline, sheltering a bay known as Jici Beach. It adds to a stunning view of Taiwan's east coast.

#landscapephotography #landscape #seascapephotography #seascape #naturephotography #nature #taiwan #asia #eastcoastkin #photography

item.title: Pugnacious speech invokes Trump’s ‘vanity projects’ to makeo…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: Pugnacious speech invokes Trump’s ‘vanity projects’ to makeover Washington and the ‘brazen, blatant corruption’
item.content:encoded: Pugnacious speech invokes Trump’s ‘vanity projects’ to makeover Washington and the ‘brazen, blatant corruption’

item.title: The Supreme Court is spending millions to beef up security a…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
The Supreme Court is spending millions to beef up security amid a rise in threats to the justices.

Along with restricting the justices' personal freedoms, the move threatens to further cocoon them in ideological bubbles as they decide controversial cases.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court is spending millions to beef up security amid a rise in threats to the justices.

Along with restricting the justices' personal freedoms, the move threatens to further cocoon them in ideological bubbles as they decide controversial cases.
